editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 24, 2026: Studying sports and disability, he laid the groundwork for the Special Olympics; NATO allies grapple with U.S....
editionData.description: Global headlines: Studying sports and disability, he laid the groundwork for the Special Olympics (Frank Hayden, who has died at 96, saw sports as a gateway to opportunity for people with special needs); NATO allies grapple with U.S. pullback, confusion over its military plans (As Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with NATO foreign ministers in Sweden, the focus is on the U.S. moving to reduce its military footprint in Europe); and Police urge new witnesses to speak out in Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor inquiry (The appeal marked the first significant update since the former British prince was arrested in February over allegations of misconduct while in office). Markets leaned higher, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 2.68% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Microsoft open-sources "the earliest DOS source code discovered to date" (Old 86-DOS source code dates back to the time before Microsoft bought it); Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links (The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine...); and Wake up! 16b (Released at the Outline Demoparty in May 2026, Ommen, NL An exploration of algorithmic density in 16 bytes of x86 assembly). Product Hunt features note.md (Local-first markdown based workspace for research writings), Memdex (Turn every AI conversation into reusable local memory), and Google Antigravity CLI (Run coding agents directly from your terminal).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Studying sports and disability, he laid the groundwork for the Special Olympics
headlines.summary: Frank Hayden, who has died at 96, saw sports as a gateway to opportunity for people with special needs.

headlines.title: NATO allies grapple with U.S. pullback, confusion over its military plans
headlines.summary: As Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with NATO foreign ministers in Sweden, the focus is on the U.S. moving to reduce its military footprint in Europe.

headlines.title: Police urge new witnesses to speak out in Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor inquiry
headlines.summary: The appeal marked the first significant update since the former British prince was arrested in February over allegations of misconduct while in office.

headlines.title: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show
headlines.summary: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.

headlines.title: In rare clash, North Korea defeats South Korea … on the soccer field
headlines.summary: In an inter-peninsula match-up between women's teams that showed the limits of sports diplomacy, players from North Korea remained stone-faced — until they won.

headlines.title: Secret Service fatally shoots gunman who fired at White House checkpoint
headlines.summary: Officers returned fire after suspect pulled weapon from bag as a bystander was also wounded.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran agreement ‘largely negotiated’, awaiting finalisation
headlines.summary: US president says deal would include reopening Strait of Hormuz after call with Middle East leaders.

headlines.title: ‘Fjord’ by Romania’s Mungiu wins top Palme d’Or film award at Cannes
headlines.summary: This marks the second time that Romanian director Cristian Mungiu has won the prestigious prize.

headlines.title: Tens of thousands rally in Serbia for antigovernment demonstrations
headlines.summary: The student-led movement, which began after the Novi Sad disaster in November 2024, is pushing for early elections.

headlines.title: ‘United States of the Middle East?’: Trump posts US flag covering Iran
headlines.summary: Latest Truth Social post comes amid 'delicate diplomacy', expert says, as US and Iran indicate progress in talks.

headlines.title: Secret Service fatally shoots suspect outside White House checkpoint, bystander wounded
headlines.summary: The suspect began shooting at posted officers, who returned fire and hit the shooter, the Secret Service said. A bystander was also shot, a law enforcement official said, but it's unclear by whom.

headlines.title: Romanian director Cristian Mungiu's 'Fjord' wins top prize at Cannes
headlines.summary: Mungiu took home the prestigious Palme D'Or for his film Fjord , a culture-war drama set in Norway.

headlines.title: Trump says a deal with Iran and opening of Strait of Hormuz are 'largely negotiated'
headlines.summary: President Trump announced the unfinalized deal on social media after talks with Israel and other allies. It aims to end the war and includes two-month negotiations on Iran's nuclear program.

headlines.title: What will Trump do next with Iran?
headlines.summary: Three months since the start of its conflict with Iran, the Trump administration is oscillating between strike threats and diplomatic overtures. Neither path has yielded a clear resolution.

headlines.title: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, his family says
headlines.summary: The two-time NASCAR champion died on Thursday, a day after passing out in a Chevrolet simulator.

headlines.title: China and Pakistan eye stronger ties
headlines.summary: President Xi Jinping called on Thursday for stronger strategic communication, continued traditional friendship and deeper all-around cooperation between China and Pakistan, as the two Asian neighbors marked the 75th anniversary of diplomatic ties.

headlines.title: Sino-Russian statements help shore up unity, stability
Long-standing Sino-Pakistani relationship valued
headlines.summary: As China and Pakistan marked the 75th anniversary of diplomatic ties on Thursday, political leaders, diplomats and analysts in Pakistan have highlighted the longstanding, multifaceted Sino-Pakistani relationship, emphasizing its economic, social, cultural and diplomatic dimensions.

headlines.title: WHO warns conflict, displacement hastening spread of Ebola
headlines.summary: Conflict and large-scale displacement in the eastern part of Democratic Republic of the Congo, or DRC, are severely complicating efforts to contain a growing Ebola outbreak caused by the rare Bundibugyo virus strain, the World Health Organization has said, warning that insecurity, population movement, and overstretched health systems are hampering surveillance and response operations in one of Central Africa's most volatile regions.

headlines.title: China's UN envoy urges protection of civilians
headlines.summary: China called for ceasefires, political dialogue and civilian protection during a UN Security Council annual debate on the protection of civilians on Wednesday, as the United Nations reported rising civilian deaths, displacement and attacks on hospitals in conflicts worldwide.

headlines.title: Financial decisions will rest with elected leaders: Sonam Wangchuk on Ladakh’s agreement with Centre
headlines.summary: Sonam Wangchuk highlights Ladakh's new agreement ensures elected leaders will control financial decisions, shifting power from the Lieutenant Governor.

headlines.title: Cabinet clears 2.5 lakh houses, ₹587 crore for PRLSI
headlines.summary: Telangana Cabinet approves 2.5 lakh houses, ₹587 crore for irrigation, and funds for Godavari Pushkarams and mid-day meals.

headlines.title: MHA warns of phishing campaign targeting users of lost or stolen iPhones
headlines.summary: MHA warns iPhone users of a phishing campaign exploiting lost devices, urging caution with suspicious SMS messages and links.

headlines.title: Army officer’s selfie with crashed helicopter puts spotlight on May 20 ‘accident’ in Ladakh
headlines.summary: Army officer's viral selfie with a crashed helicopter highlights a May 20 accident in Ladakh, prompting a Court of Inquiry.

headlines.title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets PM Modi
headlines.summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets PM Modi to enhance U.S.-India cooperation on security, trade, and technology.

headlines.title: Russia strikes Kyiv with massive missile and drone attack, killing one
headlines.summary: Explosions reverberated through the city shortly after the air ​force announced a threat of an Oreshnik launch ​on its Telegram channel.

headlines.title: Suspect dies after trading gunfire with officers near White House, Secret Service says
headlines.summary: The shooting suspect was identified as an ​emotionally disturbed ​person, a ⁠law enforcement official told Reuters.

headlines.title: US conducts military drill over Venezuelan capital Caracas
headlines.summary: The U.S. military conducted a drill over Caracas on Saturday, its first military exercise in Venezuela since U.S. troops attacked the ​capital and captured President Nicolas Maduro and his wife Cilia Flores on ‌January 3.

headlines.title: Police and protesters clash in Serbia as crowds demand president's exit
headlines.summary: Police fired tear gas and clashed with protesters in central Belgrade on Saturday, as tens of thousands gathered to demand early elections ​and an end to the more than decade-long rule of Serbia's populist President ‌Aleksandar Vucic.

headlines.title: Trump says negotiators are getting closer to Iran deal, media interviews show
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump said on Saturday that ​negotiators for the United States and Iran were "getting ‌a lot closer" to finalizing an agreement to end the war, according to an interview with CBS News.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Microsoft open-sources "the earliest DOS source code discovered to date"
hackerNews.summary: Old 86-DOS source code dates back to the time before Microsoft bought it.

hackerNews.title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
hackerNews.summary: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

hackerNews.title: Wake up! 16b
hackerNews.summary: Released at the Outline Demoparty in May 2026, Ommen, NL An exploration of algorithmic density in 16 bytes of x86 assembly.

hackerNews.title: Time to talk about my writerdeck
hackerNews.summary: tldr: * I installed console-only Debian on an old laptop (no desktop OS at all) * I added some packages to make it work better for writing: * network-manager for connecting to hotspots while I'm away * kmscon for custom fonts and more than 16 colors in the tty * tmux for a nice status

hackerNews.title: Green card seekers must leave U.S. to apply, Trump administration says
hackerNews.summary: nytimes.com: Green card seekers must leave U.S. to apply, Trump administration says.

hackerNews.title: My I3-Emacs Integration
hackerNews.summary: tiling window managers are wonderful. ultra-flexible text editors are also wonderful. for a spell, i thought i'd found the ideal solution in exwm … and i think it would have been, save for the fact that i use ordinary, graphical windows as much, if not more than, text buffers, and sometimes those windows are from dodgy programs (e.g., steam) that have trouble with EXWM's fancy input methods.

hackerNews.title: On The <dl> (2021)
hackerNews.summary: The semantics you didn’t know you needed.

hackerNews.title: Judson's Last Ride
hackerNews.summary: Today is a day Ive dreaded for over a decade. At around 6:20 a.m., well get my oldest son Judson up, give him a bath, put his safety harness on (dont worry, well dress him first), and...
